title: Define core types for replay executor (WorkflowGraph, JournalEntry, StepOutput, StepError, WorkflowContext)
description:
Define all core types needed for the ReplayExecutor per ADR-005:
- WorkflowGraph (DAG representation using petgraph)
- JournalEntry enum with all variants: Run, Sleep, WaitForSignal, GetState, SetState, Choice, Parallel, Complete, Error
- StepOutput and StepError types
- WorkflowContext for execution state

Location: wtf-core/src/types.rs

title: Implement JournalEntry serialization and helpers
description:
Implement JournalEntry per ADR-005:
- Add Serialize/Deserialize derives
- Add get_output() helper method
- Add from_output() factory method
- Add input/output as Vec<u8> for type-agnostic storage

Location: wtf-core/src/journal.rs

title: Implement Journal storage with sled persistence
description:
Implement journal persistence with sled per ADR-005:
- JournalStore struct wrapping sled::Tree
- append_entry() - add entry and flush to sled
- load_journal() - load all entries for invocation_id
- flush() - batch write with periodic flush every N entries
- Key format: journal:{invocation_id}:{index}

Location: wtf-core/src/journal.rs

title: Implement ReplayExecutor struct and new() constructor
description:
Implement ReplayExecutor struct per ADR-005:

```rust
pub struct ReplayExecutor {
    invocation_id: String,
    dag: WorkflowGraph,
    journal: Vec<JournalEntry>,
    journal_cursor: u32,
    context: WorkflowContext,
}
```

- new(invocation_id, dag, context) -> Self
- Initialize empty journal
- Initialize cursor to 0

Location: wtf-core/src/replay.rs

title: Implement execute_step with replay/live path
Implement append_journal with automatic persistence
description:
Implement append_journal per ADR-005:
- Add entry to in-memory journal Vec
- Persist to sled immediately (durability guarantee)
- Increment cursor after append
- Use JournalStore for sled operations

Location: wtf-core/src/replay.rs

title: Implement load_from_storage for crash recovery
Implement get_status for workflow state inspection
Implement WorkflowContext and execute_step_live
Add ReplayExecutor to wtf-core lib exports
Write unit tests for ReplayExecutor
description:
Write comprehensive unit tests:
- Test replay path returns cached result
- Test live path executes and journals
- Test cursor advances correctly
- Test get_status for all states
- Test load_from_storage

Location: wtf-core/src/replay.rs (tests module)
